title.en: In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years have ...

content.en:
In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years have passed.

At this time, the Void Sacred Fruit was ripe.

Ye Tian took the Void Holy Fruit and left here as fast as he could.

Buzz Buzz !!!

The fluctuations of the Void Sacred Tree spread to the outside world, and the fluctuations became larger and larger.

As a result, a Domain Ancestor followed the fluctuations into the space where the Void Sacred Tree was located, only to see the Void Sacred Tree without the Void Holy Fruit.

They didn't know the Void Sacred Tree, they only felt that this was a special treasure land, and if they practiced here, it would be much better than the outside world.

As a result, these domain ancestors competed for the right to belong here.

And Ye Tian took the most precious Ancestor Law Inheritance and the Void Holy Fruit, that Void Sacred Tree was of little value to him, so he was not interested in fighting for it.

After returning to the human world.

Ye Tian gave the Void Holy Fruit to his wife Xiao Yue and asked her to refine the Void Holy Fruit.

In this way, Xiao Yue's potential will increase a lot, and her strength will be much stronger, and she can easily become a Supreme Domain Ancestor in the future.

......

The human world, a void.

Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er came here, and he also sealed off the surrounding void to prevent this place from being snooped on by others.

"Jiu'er, the ancestor of the vast sea, I brought it!"

Ye Tian released the Haohai Sea Ancestor, but at this moment, the Haohai Sea Ancestor was still sealed and cultivated, and the strength he exerted was very weak and weak, not to mention threatening Ye Tian, even Ouyang Jiu'er could easily crush the Haohai Sea Ancestor.

"Vast Sea Ancestor!"

Ouyang Jiu'er was full of anger and murderous intent.

The Vast Sea Ancestor had never seen Ouyang Jiu'er's reincarnation, but he guessed it, "You are Hanyue, I was wrong at the beginning, spare me!"

"Spare you, impossible!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said coldly.

"Haohai Sea Ancestor, if you can beat Jiu'er, let you go, you can fight!"

Ye Tian said on the side.

“......"

Haohai Ancestor was desperate, if he fought normally, he could kill Ouyang Jiu'er countless times in seconds with one move.

But now, he was sealed by the Five Elements with his cultivation and strength, and he was only able to exert his weak physical strength, and he couldn't even defeat the Invincible Dao Ancestor, let alone fight against a Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor like Ouyang Jiu'er.

I can't beat it at all!

Haohai Sea Ancestor also knew very well that it was absolutely impossible for Ye Tian to lift the seal on his body.

He knew he was dead!

Rumble!

The fight begins!

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't choose to kill the Mighty Sea Ancestor in one move, instead of hitting him again and again.

One day!

Two days!

Three days!

......

It took ten days before Ouyang Jiu'er killed the Mighty Sea Ancestor.

As soon as the ancestor of the vast sea died, Ouyang Jiu'er seemed to be in a sublimated state of mind, and the whole person's soul was transformed.

Perhaps in the near future, Ouyang Jiu'er's strength will usher in a not weak improvement.

"Brother Ye, thank you so much!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said gratefully.

If it weren't for Ye Tian this time, she wouldn't have a chance to take revenge in the future.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian, who was still weak in her eyes, has now grown to a level that she is far beyond her reach.

She was also glad that she had met Ye Tian, otherwise she would have fallen now.

"We are friends, I will help you naturally!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

As soon as the Vast Sea Ancestor died, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master soon found out.

Because they carried some treasures from the Heavenly Emperor Palace, some of which belonged to the ancestors of the vast sea, and they were in a state of recognizing the lord.

But now, this confession has been lifted.

It shows that the ancestors of the vast sea have fallen, and those treasures have become ownerless.

The ancestors of the vast sea have fallen, and they dare not stay in the War Boundary Tower, and almost regard the Battle Boundary Tower as a place of refuge.

However, if they stay in the War Boundary Tower all the time, they will also consume points after a long time, otherwise if everyone comes to the War Boundary Tower for refuge, then won't the War Boundary Tower become a refuge?

Therefore, if you stay in the War Boundary Tower for a short time, there is no problem, and you will need to charge for more than a certain number of years.

And.

There are many places in the Battle Realm Tower that can't cultivate enlightenment, and places that can cultivate enlightenment also need to collect points.

If the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master don't go out, once the points in the future are exhausted, they will also be moved out.

In desperation, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord took refuge in some small groups within the War Realm Tower, doing things for these small solidarities, earning weak points, and living slowly like this.

No matter how miserable it is, it is stronger than going out to die.

---------------

The human world.

At this moment, Ye Tian was contemplating the Ancestor Method, although he had no way to cultivate the Ancestor Method, he could comprehend many things through the Ancestor Method.

The Space Ancestor Law seems to be a supreme treasure, and a little thing that can be comprehended is enough to consume endless years.

For example, Ye Tian used the Space Ancestor Method to assist in comprehending the Space Saint Technique, which caused his cultivation progress in the Space Saint Technique to be extremely fast, far surpassing the progress of other Saint Techniques.

Originally, the Space Saint Technique should be the most difficult to cultivate, but Ye Tian made the fastest progress, which simply broke people's cognition.

After all, this is an ancestral method that is difficult for even the Supreme Domain Ancestor to obtain, so it is naturally normal to have such an effect.

In the blink of an eye, another three million years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian had already cultivated the Space Saint Technique Void Slash to the peak realm of the late stage of Dacheng, and he was only one step away from the consummation of the Saint Technique.

Such a rate of progress is incredible for him!

"Strive to cultivate the Void Slash to the Consummation Realm, according to the introduction of the inheritance left by the Void Ancestor, once a holy technique is cultivated to the Consummation Realm at the level of the Returning Realm, it can make the soul and the holy body transform a little. The reason why the light-clothed saintess is so powerful is because of the consummation of the two holy bodies, which causes her soul and holy body to be much stronger than others, and her holy body has gone a little bit at the level of consummation, while the holy body of others is only barely consummated. If I don't know it, I will use the Soul Suppression Sacred Technique, otherwise I won't be able to hurt her soul at all!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The small transformation of the soul and the small transformation of the Holy Communion will be of great benefit to the future.

The stronger the foundation, the more benefits you can gain from breaking through the Domain Ancestor, and the greater the increase in strength.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai was not in a hurry to break through to the Domain Ancestor level, but did his best to improve the Holy Technique, striving to raise the Holy Technique to the consummation realm.

Tens of thousands of years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian struggled to achieve a breakthrough and cultivated the Space Saint Technique Void Slash to the consummation realm in one fell swoop.

Bang!!!!

The soul begins to transform slightly!

The Eucharist has also begun a small metamorphosis!

After a long time, the soul and the holy body were successfully transformed, and their strength increased by a small margin.

However, the perfection of the space holy technique gave Ye Tian a great improvement, which made his strength improve a lot.
